text.title: vector-db-index-tuning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vector-db-index-tuning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Enabling on-disk vectors (on_disk=True in HnswConfigDiff) while keeping quantization disabled on a collection that receives real-time RAG queries.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: On-disk vectors without quantization forces full disk reads for every query result rescore step. Enable scalar quantization first to keep the quantized vectors in RAM; move only the full-precision vectors to disk.
